summary: Superb matrix recording captures standout performances of Eyes, Dew and Brokedown Palace.
review: Reviewers praise this matrix source for its crystal‑clear sound, calling it “superb.” The performance shines on the three highlighted numbers – Eyes, Dew and Brokedown Palace – which are singled out as the best moments of the show. No major flaws are noted in either the playing or the audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review, but it rates the recording highly (4 stars) and highlights several standout songs, indicating both good sound quality and an enjoyable performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the matrix as “superb,” implying clear instrument separation and overall crispness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing or flow; emphasis is placed on the three highlighted tracks.
